channel.title: Notch So Good Updates
channel.description: Automatic updates for Notch So Good

item.title: Version 3.0.0
item.description:
What's New in 3.0.0

  • Unix socket protocol — Faster, more secure communication (replaces TCP)
  • 10 hook events — PostToolUse, SessionEnd, SubagentStart/Stop, PreCompact, UserPromptSubmit
  • Phase icons — Animated SF Symbols show what Claude is doing (Reading, Editing, Running...)
  • Subagent display — See nested agents with tree connectors in the session pill
  • Concurrent permissions — Multiple permission requests queue properly
  • Interrupt detection — JSONL watcher dismisses permission dialogs on Ctrl+C
  • Compacting status — Violet spinning icon during context compaction

item.title: Version 2.0.0
item.description:
What's New in 2.0.0

Permission approvals from the notch — Allow/Deny tool executions without switching to the terminal. Auto-setup hooks on first launch. 18 Chawd animations.
